# Getting Support

## Questions about contributing
See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full guide.

## Questions about the science
Open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/KR8ZYSHO3/Universal-Science-Discovery/discussions) — 
we discuss bridge proposals, open questions, and methodology there.

## Bugs or errors
Open a [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/KR8ZYSHO3/Universal-Science-Discovery/issues) 
using the Bug Report template.

## The dashboard isn't loading
Try the direct GitHub Pages URL: https://usdr.science/dashboard/
If the knowledge graph doesn't appear, wait 10-15 seconds for the 1000-node graph to load.
